title: Execute Command node not recognized after upgrade
symptom: After upgrading to n8n v2.2.3, workflows using the Execute Command node fail to publish, showing an error about unrecognized node type.
applies_when: Upgraded from n8n v1.x to v2.2.3
Using Execute Command node in workflows
not_this_if: Execute Command node is not used in the workflow
Running an older version of n8n
root_cause: In n8n v2, certain nodes, including Execute Command, are disabled by default for security reasons. This requires explicit configuration to enable them in the Docker environment.
fix_steps: Add the environment variable NODES_EXCLUDE='[n8n-nodes-base.localFileTrigger]' to the Docker configuration for both the main n8n service and the worker.
Redeploy the Docker containers to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Update the Docker configuration to enable the Execute Command node and redeploy the containers.
